nasb.text: Then Jehoshaphat stood in the assembly of Judah and Jerusalem, in the house of the Lord before the new court,

esv.text: And Jehoshaphat stood in the assembly of Judah and Jerusalem, in the house of the Lord, before the new court,

cnv.text: 約沙法就在猶大和耶路撒冷的會眾中，站在耶和華殿的新院子前面，

ccb.text: 约沙法站在耶和华殿的新院里，在犹大和耶路撒冷的民众面前，
